_comment: Synthetic facilities files (metadata + short content excerpt). FILE-002 (vendor SLA & penalty register) is restricted to leadership + the ops engineer; FILE-003 (vendor master agreement) is restricted to leadership only — both demonstrate file-level permission trimming.

files.name: Calder Tower Shared Works Log.xlsx
files.summary: The shared Calder Tower works log. Records the Chiller-2 failure, the leak repair in progress with Coolflow, interim spot-cooling on floors 18-24, and the restored ETA of 26-JUN.
files.content_excerpt: 10-JUN: Chiller-2 down (low-refrigerant lockout). Repair: Coolflow brazing suction-line leak. Mitigation: interim spot-cooling floors 18-24 live. Restored ETA: 26-JUN pending soak test.

files.name: Calder Tower Vendor SLA & Penalty Register.xlsx
files.summary: Vendor SLA and service-credit penalty register for Calder Tower. Records Coolflow's restoration SLA window and the service-credit exposure if cooling is not restored by the agreed date.
files.content_excerpt: Coolflow | Calder Tower | SLA restore window: 14 days | Service-credit if missed: per clause 6.2 | Current event: Chiller-2, target 26-JUN, exposure flagged.

files.name: Coolflow Master Services Agreement (confidential).pdf
files.summary: Confidential master services agreement with Coolflow including pricing and penalty clauses. Restricted to facilities leadership.
files.content_excerpt: [RESTRICTED — commercial terms] Clause 6.2 service-credit schedule and clause 9 penalty terms.
